name: Experian International Agent
description: Simulates Experian International credit bureau. Returns foreign credit scores and country risk profiles. Returns unavailable when no foreign address history exists for the subject.

skills.name: International Credit Score
skills.description: Returns a US-equivalent credit score based on foreign bureau records. Returns unavailable when no foreign address history exists.

skills.name: Country Risk Profile
skills.description: Returns a country risk tier (low, moderate, high, very_high) based on the subject's country of record.

skills.name: Foreign Tradelines
skills.description: Returns the count of foreign tradelines found for the subject.
